response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive tooling experience (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, mobile platform expertise, and organizational change leadership — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via open-source projects and workshops
Broad cross-platform expertise including mobile (iOS/Apple TV) and infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Limited demonstrable mobile platform ecosystem experience beyond iOS app maintenance
Absence of documented organizational change initiatives or roadmap ownership
